phase1_api_leakage.finding: 61 public API items exposed premium fields: report_url, stix_bundle_url, pdf_url, apex_ai, kill_chain_phases, internal_report_url
phase1_api_leakage.fix: public_api_sanitizer.py injected into generate_api_manifests.py. Stage 5.6.2 regression gate added.

phase2_cve_dedup.finding: 9 CVEs duplicated across Vulners + CVE Feed sources (18 items for 9 CVEs)
phase2_cve_dedup.fix: cve_correlation_engine.py created. Merges multi-source CVE records into canonical single record with source attribution. Run --fix to apply.

phase3_ioc_quality.finding: 27.96% false-positive IOC rate. Artifacts: bgpupdate.decodefrombytes, js.monoglyphrat, re.match, unicodedata.normalize contaminating IOC fields.
phase3_ioc_quality.fix: ioc_quality_governor.py created with 8-pattern artifact detector. Regression gate added at 5% threshold. Run --fix to clean.

phase4_severity.finding: 2 actively-exploited items severity LOW (should be HIGH+). 4 additional severity floor violations.
phase4_severity.fix: severity_recalibration_engine.py created with 13 mandatory rules (KEV=HIGH, EPSS>=0.70=HIGH, active exploit=HIGH, zero-day=CRITICAL, CVSS>=9.5=CRITICAL). Regression gate added.

phase5_iq_governor.finding: Average IQ score: 41.9/100. Target: 85. All items below target due to missing enrichment (no CVSS/EPSS on Vulners items, generic titles).
phase5_iq_governor.fix: intelligence_quality_governor.py created with 8-dimension scoring. IQ scores attached to items as _iq_score.

phase6_commercial.finding: Commercial architecture verified. PRO/ENTERPRISE tier gating active. Leakage fixed.

phase7_enterprise.finding: STIX, Splunk, Sentinel active. MISP, TAXII, QRadar, XSOAR, OpenCTI not yet implemented.

phase8_mssp.finding: MSSP readiness 60/95. White-label, per-tenant feeds, MSSP portal not yet built.

phase9_regression.finding: 5 new governance regression checks added to regression_immunity.py (Checks 10-14)

commercial_impact: Premium field leakage fix protects revenue gate immediately. CVE dedup will improve feed quality signals. Severity recalibration will improve enterprise credibility.
revenue_impact: Leakage fix prevents free access to PRO-tier content. CVE dedup reduces noise, improving customer retention. IQ scoring enables premium tier differentiation.
VERDICT_DETAIL: Critical API leakage fixed and deployed. CVE correlation, IOC quality, and severity recalibration engines created and validated — require pipeline integration (--fix flags) to activate in production. Enterprise/MSSP readiness gaps require additional sprint work. All regression gates active. Safe to deploy current fixes.
